titleStmt.title: SII 9.160: original edition by R. Shama Sastry and N. Lakshminarayan Rao
No. 160. (A.R. No. 235 of 1913.) ON A SLAB NEAR A WELL AT KOLAGALLU, SAME TALUK AND DISTRICT.

summary.p: This is damaged and dated ChƒÅ·∏∑ukya-Vikrama year 16, PrajƒÅpati ‚Ä¢ ‚Ä¢ ‚Ä¢ ‚Ä¢ ‚Ä¢ 10, B·πõihaspativƒÅra (PrajƒÅpati = A.D. 1091-1092.) It refers itself to the reign of the ChƒÅ·∏∑ukya king Tribuvanamalladƒìva, and records a grant of land made for the service of the god M≈´lasthƒÅna-Durggƒì≈õvara, for a matha and education, by the BrƒÅhman DurgarƒÅja, son of PamparƒÅja, who was the son of Durgasi·πÅha, the son of ƒícharƒÅja of the SƒÅ·πÖkhyƒÅyana-g≈çtra and VƒÅji-kula.

revisionDesc.change: Conversion of digital encoding to DHARMA encoding scheme according to EGD (Encoding Guide for Diplomatic Editions)

div.p:

rƒÅjƒÅdhirƒÅja paramƒì≈õvara paramabha·π≠·π≠ƒÅraka·πÅ satyƒÅ≈õrayaku·∏∑ati·∏∑aka cƒÅ

ja·πÅ ta·πÅna·∏çige·πüaguvina·πÅ ta·πÅna tƒìja·πÅ di≈õƒÅma·πÅ·∏ça·∏∑ado·∏∑ta·∏∑poyvina·πÅ
nativi≈õadaya≈õa·∏•≈õrƒ´di≈õƒÅda·πÅtida·πÅt≈çjva·∏∑ama·πÅ dikcakrado·∏∑sa·πÅda·πáisi
jana·πÅ pƒÅ·∏∑isutti·∏ªdano·∏∑pi·πÅde·∏∑eya·πÅ saptƒÅbdhimƒìkha·∏∑eyanatiba·∏∑a·πÅ vikramƒÅditya

m≈´vi·π≠·π≠igeydirppa po·∏çara·πÅ dv·πõttaripuk·π£mƒÅpƒÅ·∏∑a
tenisi nega·∏ªda vikramƒÅdityadƒìvana vijayarƒÅjyamuttar≈çttarƒÅbhiv¬Æ

ttama sucaritrƒÅla·πÅkƒÅranapƒÅra ku≈õala·πÅ vi≈õvanuta·πÅ kƒ´rttilak·π£mƒ´
bhuvƒìcirƒÅjanesada·πÅ vi≈õva·πÅbharƒÅcakrado·∏∑u . ƒÄtana tanaya·πÅ vi
pƒìta·πÅ niravadya vi≈õvavidyƒÅvibudhavrƒÅtanuta bh≈´bhuvanakhyƒÅta·πÅ ta
vargga·πÅ durgga·πÅ vinayada nele dharmada tƒÅyvane satyada janmabh≈´mi
mƒÅ·∏∑pana ka·πái vivƒìkadƒÅgara ga·πüa·πÅ durgga·πÅ vibhumahƒ´ma·πÅ·∏ça
ƒÄ nega·∏ªda durggasi·πÅhana s≈´nu nijanayanapay≈çjavanabhƒÅskara
da nidhi vipu·∏∑a≈õrƒ´ni·∏∑aya·πÅ pampa·πÅ nega·∏ªda·πÅ jagado·∏∑ . to·πáe pe·πüarƒÅrƒ´
jagannutana ba·πáni nƒÅnivaha neleyƒÅgi naga
nivaha tƒÅne neleyƒÅgi nega·∏∑teyanƒÅnta sajjanapra·πáutanana·πána ba·πáni
jana pa·πÅparƒÅjana·πÅ . Ene nega·∏ªdapa·πÅpana manumƒÅrggana sati sa
te patibhakte nega·∏∑teva·∏çeye vanitƒÅjanaratna·πÅ pa·∏çeda
suvikhyƒÅ yƒÅda pa·πÅparƒÅja·πÅga·πÅ ti·∏∑aka·πÅ pu·π≠·π≠ida
no·∏∑a·πÅ nƒ´ti gu·πáada mane ·πáamaccariya
nama t≈çrku·πÅ saucama·πüivor·πánu·∏çi ni≈õca·∏∑asatvame·πÅbivakkƒÅgaramƒÅgi
tima·πá·∏ça·∏∑amellama·πÅ ya≈õa≈õ≈õrƒ´ mƒÅ·∏çidunnatiyene negarda
s≈çluvƒ´ kƒÅ·πÅcƒ´vibhramamanƒÅntumadƒìnesedi·∏ªduda·πána padmƒÅ·∏∑i samagradi
na nƒÅbhipadmama·πÅ haladav≈çlpararppuru·π£arentu gu·πá≈çnnatiyi·πÅde
gu·πáapra·πáutasadgu·πáavarggananemma durggana·πÅ gu·πáiga·∏∑a·πÅ tamagoldu
sauryyadi sadgu·πáama·πÅ tƒÅ·∏∑dida durggarƒÅjano·∏∑i·∏∑ƒÅprakhyƒÅtano·∏∑ƒÅrppa
ha·πána me bhuvige sphuranma·πáiyo·∏∑t≈ç·πüuva kƒÅntiyo
·∏∑o·∏∑ . Enibarba mahƒÅm≈çda·πÅ manumƒÅrgga durgana nanditƒÅma
sa·πÅpatpu·π£·π≠avidvajjanajanatƒÅna·πÅdanakƒÅriyƒÅyitene ko·∏∑gallu
mƒÅ·∏çisida·πÅ ≈õivƒÅlayamanurvvƒ´l≈çkasamp≈´jyama·πÅ
jiku·∏∑ati·∏∑akananavadyagu·πáasthƒÅna·πÅ durggam≈´lasthƒÅna mahƒì≈õvaranija
svasti ≈õrƒ´maccƒÅ·∏∑ukyavikramavari·π£ada 16 neya prajƒÅpatisa·πÅva
10 b·πõhaspativƒÅrada·πÅdu m≈´lasthƒÅna durggƒì≈õvarada
prƒÅsƒÅda ma·π≠akkamalliya vidyƒÅdƒÅnakka·πÅ tap≈ç
